amendment.description: To create a point of order against reconciliation legislation that would not increase Federal funding for or participation in school meal programs.

action.text: Amendment SA 4884 ruled out of order by the chair.

Motion to waive all applicable budgetary discipline with respect to amendment SA 4884, not having achieved 60 votes in the affirmative, rejected in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 48 - 50. Record Vote Number: 93.
Point of order that the amendment violates section 305(b)(2) of the CBA raised in Senate with respect to amendment SA 4884.
Amendment SA 4884 proposed by Senator Hirono.

Roll call votes on amendments in Senate: Motion to waive all applicable budgetary discipline with respect to amendment SA 4884, not having achieved 60 votes in the affirmative, rejected in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 48 - 50. Record Vote Number: 93.
Senate amendment proposed (on the floor): Amendment SA 4884 proposed by Senator Hirono.
